families.surface: proposal signing, validation signing, manifest verification, accepted-set selection
families.assertion: local deterministic vectors lock canonical signing payloads, manifest trust wiring, and peer proposal selection semantics while live rippled fixtures are unavailable
residual_blockers: needs rippled side-by-side proposal stream fixture with serialized TMProposeSet payloads and expected accepted-set transitions
needs rippled validation stream fixture with sfSigningTime, sfCloseTime, sfConsensusHash, and sfValidatedHash fields captured from live validation objects
needs rippled manifest verification fixture covering validator-token manifest load, ephemeral signing-key delegation, rotation, and revocation

families.surface: validator-list expiration/effective transitions and NegativeUNL disable/reenable
families.assertion: must prove effective UNL filtering and 60 percent original-UNL floor against rippled flag-ledger behavior before production parity can be declared
residual_blockers: needs committed or reproducible rippled fixture for validator-list expiration and effective UNL transition snapshots
needs committed or reproducible rippled fixture for NegativeUNL scheduled disable, active disabled validator filtering, and reenable lifecycle
needs close-loop proof that live validation trust/quorum uses the parent-ledger effective UNL rather than the static configured UNL

families.assertion: must prove flag-ledger amendment and fee vote generation, aggregation, and pseudo-transaction acceptance against rippled before production parity can be declared
residual_blockers: needs rippled amendment majority fixture covering open-for-voting, majority timing, amendment-blocked reporting, and EnableAmendment pseudo-transaction construction
needs rippled fee voting fixture covering base fee, reserve base, reserve increment, SetFee pseudo-transaction construction, and XRPFees transition behavior
needs protocol-control reporting fixture proving feature, fee, amendment, and validation-quorum admin surfaces reflect validated-ledger state

families.assertion: replay tooling must ingest proposal, validation, manifest, validator-list, amendment, fee, and NegativeUNL control-plane traffic instead of transaction/prestate bundles only
residual_blockers: needs committed replay schema for proposal streams, validation streams, manifest streams, amendment votes, fee votes, and NegativeUNL control flow
needs deterministic runner that can compare xLedgRS accepted sets, validation trust decisions, and protocol-control reports to captured rippled outputs
needs CI target that runs committed public fixtures and fails on missing or bridge-only proof
